proposed_artifacts.content:
## Attachment Extraction Result for NAP-SRC-0066

**Source:** NAP-SRC-0066 (Slateford Road Trimester 2 Full Flat Inspections email)

**Attachments identified in email body:**
1. Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf
2. Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf

**Status:** Attachments not extracted. The PDF extraction (pdftotext) did not include the attached files. Further action required to obtain these documents.

**Recommendation:** Use a tool capable of extracting embedded PDF attachments (e.g., pdfdetach or a Python script with PyPDF2) to retrieve the attached files from the original PDF source.
proposed_artifacts.title: Attachment extraction result for NAP-SRC-0066

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use a PDF attachment extraction tool (e.g., pdfdetach or PyPDF2) to extract the two attachments (Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf and Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf) from the original PDF file at 01-sources/communications/NAP-SRC-0066 - Slateford Road Trimester 2 Full Flat Inspections.pdf. Save the extracted files as separate sources and update the evidence manifest.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded attachments from NAP-SRC-0066 PDF

summary: Extracted text of NAP-SRC-0066 references two attachments: 'Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf' and 'Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf'. The attachments are not included in the extracted text or available as separate sources. A follow-up task is proposed to locate and extract these attachments.

uncertainties.reason: Attachments referenced in email body but not available as separate sources or extracted content.
